name: session-gate
description: Thin Cowork session-boundary wrapper for KB-lifecycle and a companion workflow plugin. Detects which canonical surfaces apply and routes startup and closeout to them without duplicating durable memory or workflow canon.

interface.shortDescription: Thin session wrapper for KB workspaces
interface.longDescription: Install a thin session-boundary wrapper for Cowork that detects whether KB-lifecycle, a companion workflow plugin, or both are present, then points startup and closeout back to the canonical plugin surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use the Session Gate gate-session-start plugin/slash command to start this session safely in a KB-based project.
Use the Session Gate gate-session-end plugin/slash command to close this Cowork session without drifting from KB-lifecycle, vNext, or the companion workflow plugin.
